name: state-puc-ai-disclosure-tracker
description: EnergyTech jurisdiction-spanning lifecycle tracker for state Public Utility Commission AI rules, FERC orders, NERC reliability standards, DOE executive-order implementation, TSA Security Directives, and ISO/RTO Business Practice Manuals. Covers utility-regulator + grid-reliability-regulator AI rules — distinct from LegalTech / GovTech state trackers.
